message:
fix: Add bigint module to batch test executable imports

The batch test runner was missing the bigint module import in test
executables. This caused BigInt comparisons to fail at runtime when
using assertEqual on large integers (> i64 max).

Added bigint to the imports list for test executables in batch_build.zig.

Note: There's still an issue where batch-compiled tests fail on BigInt
comparisons while direct execution works. This needs further investigation
into how the batch build system links modules differently.
